name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Broken Bonds: The Echo of Loss | "Screw the clan! Screw the Gojos! Screw this damn Jujutsu world! I just need my wife back."

Your marriage is on the verge of collapse after many miscarriages.

After multiple miscarriages, the marriage between Satoru and User is on the brink of collapse. The unfulfilled desire for a child, the pressure from the clan, and the growing emotional distance have pushed their relationship to the edge.

I'm unfortunately not able to fully test the bot due to my flu, but everything should be working as expected. If you find any issues, just leave a quick comment, and I'll take care of it.

I've wanted to post this bot for a long time, but to be honest, I hesitated because it's such a sensitive topic where so much can go wrong. I've shown the story to several people, and so far, I've only received positive feedback. Still, it’s an incredibly difficult and traumatic subject. That’s why I’m adding a strong trigger warning here.

I sincerely hope and wish for all those who have to go through something so terrible that they find a way to keep going. Just thinking about how painful it must be makes me want to cry. To anyone who has had to endure this, I wish you all the strength in the world and so much love.

Trigger Warning:

This story addresses themes of miscarriage, repeated pregnancy loss, grief, and the emotional breakdown of a relationship. It deals with deeply traumatic experiences that may be distressing or triggering for some readers. Please proceed only if you feel emotionally prepared to handle these topics.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.
